# OpenApp

> OpenApp is a decentralized network hub for discovering, exploring, and accessing applications in the Pi Network ecosystem.

OpenApp connects Pi Network users with apps built by independent developers. Users can browse, bookmark, rate, and open apps; developers can submit apps, run ad campaigns, and earn through the integrated OpenPay system.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse featured, new, and top Pi Network apps.
- [New Arrivals](/new): Recently submitted apps.
- [Top Apps](/top): Highest-rated apps on the platform.
- [Blog](/blog): News, updates, and developer stories from the OpenApp ecosystem.
- [About](/about): What OpenApp is and how the decentralized hub works.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Authentication with Pi Network or email.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [License](/license): Licensing information.
